query: INSERT INTO quizzes (title, titleSwahili, description, descriptionSwahili, moduleId, passingScore, timeLimit, isPublished) VALUES ('Introduction to Christian Doctrine Assessment', 'Tathmini ya Utangulizi wa Doktrini ya Kikristo', 'Comprehensive assessment covering all 6 lessons on Christian doctrine. Students must score 70% or higher to receive a certificate of completion.', 'Tathmini kamili inayofunika somo la 6 kuhusu doktrini ya Kikristo. Wanafunzi lazima wakamatia alama 70% au zaidi kupokea cheti cha kumaliza.', 60001, 70, 60, 1);

Students must score 70% or higher to receive a certificate of completion.', 'Tathmini kamili inayofunika somo la 6 kuhusu doktrini ya Kikristo.
